import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from app import create_app, db
from app.models.user import User
app = create_app\(\)
client = app.test_client\(\)

with app.app_context\(\):
    db.create_all\(\)
    pages = [
        \('GET', '/'\),
        \('GET', '/auth/login'\),
        \('GET', '/auth/register'\),
    ]
    for method, path in pages:
        r = client.get\(path\)
        body = r.data.decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
        has_strata = 'Strata' in body or 'STRATA' in body
        has_rajdhani = 'Rajdhani' in body
        print\(f'{path:25} -> {r.status_code}  Strata:{has_strata}  Rajdhani:{has_rajdhani}'\)
" 2>&1)
